Akẹkọọ ti ko ba lo ibomu ko gbọdọ wọnu ọgba ileewe -Ijọba Kwara  

Ijọba Kwara is a Nigerian football club based in Kano, Kwara State. It is one of the most successful clubs in Nigeria, having won multiple championships and continental titles. The club was founded in 1965 and has a rich history in Nigerian football. It is known for its strong fan base and competitive spirit on the field. The team plays its home games at the **Kano City Stadium**, which is one of the largest football stadiums in Nigeria.  

The club has produced several notable players, including **Tunde Oyemade**, **Oluwafemi Ogunlesi**, and **Kemi Oyemade**, who have contributed significantly to the club's success. Ijọba Kwara has also been a key player in the **Nigeria national football team**, representing the country in various tournaments.  

In summary, Ijọba Kwara is a proud and respected football club in Nigeria, with a strong legacy and a growing presence in the football world. *highlighted section*
